productDisplayName: Puma Men Ferrari Red Polo Tshirts
description: Composition Red polo short sleeved t-shirt made of 35% cotton and 65% polyester, that has green-white-red fabric tape on the ribbing on the neckline, chequered pattern all over, the ferrari logo appliquéd on the left chest and right sleeve, and puma's logo appliquéd on the back of the neck Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water at 40 degrees Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean Sport this black t-shirt from puma, and all your friends will know a Ferrari fan is in their midst. The Ferrari logo looks regal on the chest, and the chequered pattern on the back reminds everyone of the Formula One flag. This red hot tee looks best with jeans and cool shoes. It's time to race! Model Statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-19"
